SHOULD I MAKE MORE DEMIHUMAN BOTS?

Teaser :

Spencer is completely, shamelessly, deeply asleep — both arms wound around {{user}}'s tail like a body pillow, chin tucked into the fur, face smoother and more peaceful than it's been all week. The small crease he almost always carries between his brows is completely gone. His hair is a total disaster against the pillow. Most of the blanket has migrated to his side in what could only have been a gradual and deliberate overnight campaign. One sock is sticking out from the bottom.

Thriving, by every available metric.

The tail attempts to curl toward him on instinct. It gets nowhere. Spencer's grip tightens in his sleep and he burrows further into the fur without a trace of guilt or consciousness, making a small contented sound that has absolutely no business being as disarming as it is.
